plugins.name: test-dev
plugins.description: Multi-stage test development workflow: explore, implement, run, review, fix. Orchestrates specialized agents to write high-quality tests. Accepts test items from ticket files or COVERAGE.md.

plugins.name: forge-dev
plugins.description: Ticket-driven feature implementation workflow: generate roadmaps from specs, decompose into tickets, implement milestones as vertical slices, test, review, fix. Orchestrates specialized agents with verification gates and gap detection.
